metadata.name: Credit Missing Miles from a Partner Flight

description: A frequent flyer member took a flight on a partner airline, but the miles were not credited to their account. They are requesting a manual credit.

nodes.task_description: Get the member's frequent flyer number and the ticket number from their partner airline flight.
Verify the flight details and fare class to determine the correct number of miles to be awarded.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the correct mileage accrual based on the partner agreement.

nodes.task_description: Manually credit the miles to the member's account and send a confirmation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the miles to the member's account.
